content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1572: Eternal Seal! Translator: Sigma_ Editor: SSins

Time could fix formless things like the soul, Consciousness, thought, and mind while space could seal entities like the body, blood, and even power. When Time and Space power Upanishad were urged at the same time, together they could seal both visible and invisible things!

It was a superb technique that DeCarlos and Ming Hao’s teacher had invented after Bloodthirsty defeated him. He had spent the rest of his life studying this technique. However, it was unfortunate that he had cultivated only Space power Upanishad as he couldn’t find any expert at the same realm with Time power Upanishad to test this marvelous technique.

After so many years on the seabed of the Sea of Annihilation, Montecie and Shi Yan had joined hands to cast the “Great Seal” technique, which had facilitated them to bring Grace Mainland and escape to Cloud Mist Territory.

At that time, Shi Yan’s realm was too far behind what he had today and his understanding of Space power Upanishad wasn’t profound enough.

Time flew fast and Shi Yan reached Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. At this moment, his realm, power, and Upanishads weren’t less than Montecie. Even Shi Yan and Montecie couldn’t estimate how formidable their Great Seal Technique could be if they cast it right now.

Waves of space energy rippled from his body and expanded.

So many magical spaces were created like illusional images reflected in thousands of mirrors.

All of a sudden, the energy impact in this area paused. The warriors could even see the trajectories of many blue lightning strikes and shooting lights. At this moment, many corpses, masses of blood, and broken battleships that were moving around as the momentum of the battles attracted them froze.

From Shi Yan as the center, the space ripples reached hundreds of miles. All matters like clothes of blood, veins, cosmic dust, pieces of broken weapons that the naked eye could see were all fixed.

Except for Shi Yan and Montecie, only Beverly could move.

Beverly had a human torso and a snake body. She was panic-stricken when her voluptuous body crackled like a rusted machine trying to move.

She was so chilled as she tried to urge her power. Blood flowed in body massively like rolling waves as she tried to move her body.

As Shi Yan’s Space Seal was cast, she felt her body get tied by invisible shackles that prevented her from moving her body.

Fortunately, because a lot of Montecie’s God power was consumed, her Time power Upanishad couldn’t catch up with Shi Yan’s power right away.

If her Time Seal was cast at the same time, her soul, Soul Consciousness, and power Upanishad would be fixed too. At that time, she couldn’t think or change her power Upanishads anymore. Also, her mobility was forced to stop. She would become a puppet that Shi Yan and Montecie could easily control.

She gritted her teeth and tried to back off.

She couldn’t move fast. Usually, she could travel one thousand miles within a breath. And now, she was just an ordinary warrior who could use only her physical strength to back off helter-skelter.

Bright lights shot out from behind Montecie’s neck like time that never came back.

At this moment, Montecie was very beautiful; she wasn’t less attractive than Mei Ji. Moreover, she had a mature glamor that was rare in this world.

Although she used to be the most beautiful lady in this universe, she had used her Time power to bring herself back to twelve or thirteen years old to hide her utterly mesmerizing appearance. Many people had forgotten her beauty.

At this moment, due to her significant loss of God power, she couldn’t rewind her time and she had to appear as if she was twenty-five or twenty-six years old. Her exquisite glamor finally came back to her.

Her hair was like a cascading waterfall of time. While her Time power Upanishad was urged, so many wisps of her soul power moved and seeped into Shi Yan’s confining space. She was using time power to strengthen the seal.

She finally made it an eternal seal!

The light of Time controlled by her soul and power Upanishad seeped into the space Shi Yan had affected previously. In the next moment, that space slowly changed.

The empty space slowly materialized and turned into some substance like a massive block of amber, which was a peculiar form of space!

At the same time, Montecie’s beautiful face blushed. She glanced at Shi Yan. A gleam of puzzled and shy expressions crossed her eyes.

When her Time power Upanishad entered that fixed space, it was like her soul got into Shi Yan’s soul.

In that short moment, her soul and Shi Yan’s soul began to blend with each other. They could feel each other’s seven emotions and six desires. Montecie could feel Shi Yan’s feeling and what he had experienced through his whole life.

It was a magical feeling that she couldn’t describe!

Shi Yan had used his Space power to fix that section of the void. At his Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, when his power was urged, his soul, God power, and Soul Consciousness stuck together like a shadow and a body. That’s why the confining power of Space had his Soul Seal.

Previously, when his realm was still low and when he cooperated with Montecie to cast this Great Seal Technique, they hadn’t formed a soul resonance. Thus, he didn’t have any feeling at that time.

Similarly, Montecie hadn’t felt anything at that time.

This time, it was different...

According to DeCarlos and Ming Hao’s teacher, if the two who had similar realm and power cast this Great Seal together, their souls could blend with each other and create a consciousness resonance where they could reach a magical state of fusing into one in a short time.

Today, Shi Yan at Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm had a similar realm and power to Montecie. The strange feature they hadn’t been able to trigger last time had finally happened.

When Time power Upanishad entered, it made the void visible and become like a pond of some liquid substance.

At the same time, Montecie’s and Shi Yan’s spirit, souls, and consciousness merged together for a short moment. However, it was enough to reach the marvelous effects of soul intercourse. The energy fluctuation from this soul intercourse was hundreds of times more passionate than real intimate activities between a man and a woman.

Shi Yan tried to keep himself together. He even used Space power Upanishad to freeze his face and stop himself from groaning from pleasure, which would embarrass himself in front of Montecie.

However, the magical stimulation from his soul came like unceasing waves. He felt relaxed and it was so wonderful that he couldn’t resist.

Montecie had lived for tens of thousands of years. Although she was the most beautiful woman in this sea of stars, she had followed her faith for all of her life, which was to pursue power and the Phantom Clan’s prosperity. She had never fallen for any man. In her long life, she had never had intimate times with any man and she had never thought about the romantic things between a man and a woman.

But today, while using the strange fusing technique of the Great Seal, her soul and Shi Yan’s soul connected to each other magically. The resonance created by that fusion was thousands of times better than real sexual activity. She was sinking in the pool of desire constantly.

She didn’t look at Shi Yan anymore and closed her eyes, her face blushing. Another beam of light shot out from her body and poured into the sealed space.

From her and Shi Yan as the center, the world seal that looked like a big block of amber expanded amazingly fast!

Beverly at Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm couldn’t escape. The duet seal had fixed her. At this moment, she looked like a little snake trapped inside amber. Her fear was frozen on her face as she was retreating.

“Leave the space Montecie and I are covering at your fastest speed!”

At this moment, the Absolute Beginning blood in Shi Yan’s body burned. He used his will of steel to send the message to Han Tian, Hiro, and Dracula to ask them to prepare.

It was because Shi Yan could feel that the soul intercourse between him and Montecie had promoted the Great Seal to the point that they might not be able to control it. The amber space had crazily expanded and sealed Beverly at her Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. They couldn’t estimate how big the area it could cover after it was done reaching.

Shi Yan had a terrifying feeling. Once the seal was finished, he couldn’t dissolve it. The terrifying power of Time and Space made him restless too.

Han Tian’s team was frightened when they received Shi Yan’s message. They didn’t care that they might fall into the lower hand in their battles but tried to spread Shi Yan’s message to their subordinates.

Instantaneously, all members of the Mysterious Sky Clan, White Bone Clan, Heavenly Craftsmen Clans, and the God Clan who were fighting the Devouring Clan, Black Demon Clan, Ancient Monster Clan, and Sou Clan tried to retreat from the battle quickly, leaving as fast and far away from Montecie and Shi Yan as they could.

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!

Many warriors had run away. The battlefield became chaotic. The four clans under the furious attack didn’t know what had happened. They exhaled in relief when the others suddenly ran away.

Shortly after, they recognized that an amber space was crazily swarming toward them and covering the entire world.

Thousands of fellows of the Soul Clan, Ancient Monster Clan, Devouring Clan, and Black Demon Clan were fixed. They were sealed here eternally by the Time and Space power Upanishad.

The experts at Ethereal God Realm, Incipient God Realm, Immortal God Realm and even Territory Ancestor Realm had become little worms inside the amber. Their souls, consciousness, thoughts, and soul altars froze altogether with their bodies. They were never going to get rid of it. They were going to stay like this forever.

From Montecie and Shi Yan as the center, an area extending billions of miles become like a massive lake with tens of thousands of members of the Devouring Clan, Black Demon Clan, Ancient Monster Clan, and Soul Clan sealed. They were all elite forces of the four clans, famous warriors in this sea of stars with some of them at the Territory Ancestor Realm.

At this moment, space was confined and time was paused. Every creature had fallen into deadly silence.

An eternal seal!
